name: Fondue Indienne
recipeIngredient: 10 ml curry powder (or more or less, to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the bottom and sides of the fondue pot with the crushed garlic clove.
2. Combine the garlic, onion, wine, and curry powder in the fondue pot until it reaches a simmer.
3. If desired, prepare this mixture on the stove first, then transfer it to the fondue pot.
4. In a plastic bag, combine the grated cheese and flour.
5. Gradually stir in the cheese mixture into the fondue pot, a handful at a time, allowing each addition to melt completely.
6. Continue stirring until all the cheese is incorporated; the mixture should be bubbling and smooth.
7. Stir in the spicy fruit relish.
8. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
9. Keep the mixture warm over low heat on a burner.
10. Seat your guests, fill their wine glasses, and enjoy your meal.
This recipe is designed for easy preparation and enjoyment with dinner guests or alone.
